summary: Docs, features, and polish across the entire ecosystem: GitBook docs for all 5 repos, Presale page, interactive rewards calculator, serverless token pricing, and automated devlog system.
Alluria smart contracts deployed and integrated, new tokens added to Eloqura DEX, and Explorer updated with Alluria protocol support.
Freewill persistent memory hub launched, OEC V2 contracts deployed, staking dashboard refreshed with stat cards and Claim All Rewards.
Massive Eloqura DEX week: token detail pages, chart improvements, arbitrage bot, swap overhaul. Explorer gained wallet balances and on-chain pricing.
OECsplorer launched from scratch, DAO Hub redesigned with portfolio and analytics, ecosystem sidebars added across all dApps.
Staking and Eloqura DEX went live on Sepolia with real contracts. OECFaucet deployed, collapsible sidebar pattern established across dApps.
Layout and sidebar polish across Alluria, Staking, and DAO Hub. Foundation work for the collapsible sidebar pattern.
